/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,simple_velocity_msg_s__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.cpython-310-x86_64-linux-gnu.so -o rosidl_generator_py/simple_velocity_msg/simple_velocity_msg_s__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.cpython-310-x86_64-linux-gnu.so CMakeFiles/simple_velocity_msg__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c__pyext.dir/rosidl_generator_py/simple_velocity_msg/_simple_velocity_msg_s.ep.rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/vm/training/ros2_ws/src/build/simple_velocity_msg/rosidl_generator_py/simple_velocity_msg:/home/vm/training/ros2_ws/src/build/simple_velocity_msg:/opt/ros/humble/lib: rosidl_generator_py/simple_velocity_msg/libsimple_velocity_msg__rosidl_generator_py.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpython3.10.so libsimple_velocity_msg__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so libsimple_velocity_msg__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librmw.so libsimple_velocity_msg__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
